description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to branches matching branch-* and tags matching v[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9], and allows manual dispatch with inputs for branch, date, SHA, and build type. The workflow has multiple jobs for setting up telemetry, building C++ and Python packages, uploading conda packages, building documentation, building and publishing wheels for C++ and Python, and summarizing telemetry.
